Introduction
    Xu Si is meets Jiang Hu when her father's company goes bankrupt. Xu Si is always ambitious, sets his sights on her company, "Tengyue". Determined to save "Tengyue" at all costs, Jiang Hu engages in a fierce battle with Xu Si.

Also known as: I Want to Go Against the Wind
